summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 new features: Drone Camera Feeds, Species Identification via AI, and Email Notifications (MOCKED). All backend APIs working 100%, frontend fully functional with proper navigation and UI integration.

resolved_issues.issue: Route conflict with parameterized drone routes
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Moved feeds routes before parameterized routes in FastAPI
Changed to include image URL in text prompt

resolved_issues.issue: Expected JSON body but was configured for query parameters
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Added SendAlertRequest model for JSON body

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console

design_issues.note: Chart rendering warnings, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: All 49 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Drone camera feeds - GET /api/drones/feeds returns active feeds
Drone camera feeds - GET /api/drones/{id}/feed returns specific feed
Email notifications - GET /api/notifications/history returns notification log
Email notifications - POST /api/notifications/send-alert sends to subscribers (MOCKED)
Species identification - POST /api/species/identify processes images with AI
Species identification - GET /api/species/history returns identification history
Frontend navigation - All new menu items (Camera Feeds, Species ID, Notifications) present
Frontend routing - All new pages (/feeds, /species, /notifications) load correctly
Frontend UI - Camera feeds grid displays active drone feeds
Frontend UI - Species identification form accepts image URLs and processes via AI
Frontend UI - Notifications page allows email subscription management
Frontend UI - Modal dialogs work for feed details and forms
Frontend UI - Sidebar navigation and responsive design working
Integration - Frontend successfully calls all new backend APIs
Integration - Real-time updates and WebSocket connection working
